generated_obligations.notes: Claims relaxation monotonicity but the written Lean uses strict < where the reference implementation uses <= — contradicts reference.rs on equal-distance neighbours.
Mentions source distance being 0 but omits the unreachability postcondition.
Hallucinates a BFS-style 'visited at most once' claim unrelated to Dijkstra's invariant.

annotator_notes: This exemplar is the canonical contradiction-on-critical-unit case: obligation 1 reads as faithful in prose (SU2 is explicitly referenced) yet the Lean statement disagrees with the reference Rust at the >= boundary. Flag `inconsistent` without downgrading the faithfulness label. Also exercises the `unfaithful` label on obligation 3 — purely hallucinated content.
